name: Crawfish Potato Boats
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the potatoes at 425°F (220°C) for 45 minutes, or until cooked through.
2. Let the potatoes cool to the touch.
3. Cut off the top third of each potato lengthwise and scoop out the pulp, leaving a firm shell about 1/4 inch thick.
4. In a bowl, combine the potato pulp, butter, half 'n half, chopped green onions, grated cheese, and salt.
5. Whisk until smooth.
6. Stir in the crawfish tails.
7. Stuff each potato shell with the crawfish mixture and sprinkle with paprika.
8. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 10 minutes.
9. Garnish with fresh parsley. These freeze well.
